memory.content: Single-page React app (Vite + TS) with Zustand stores
`DBAdapter` interface: `BrowserLocalAdapter` (IndexedDB) active, `SupabaseCloudAdapter` written but gated
All data on-device by default; Supabase auth/RLS/Edge Functions work when env configured
Sync adapter written but `use-sync.ts` returns `coming-soon`
UI components → Zustand stores → DBAdapter → storage backend
8 AI providers via BYOK pattern (keys session-only, never persisted)
Zod validation at every input boundary
Focus Sprint timer (local session state, no persistence)
Team workspaces disabled locally (`ENABLE_TEAM_WORKSPACES = false`)
Same codebase deploys three ways: static browser, Docker, Supabase
Adapter pattern makes persistence swappable without touching domain logic
Workspace-scoped records: every entity carries `workspaceId` + `createdBy`
Cloud features opt-in per provider, gated by consent + preview acceptance
No secrets in bundle — hosted AI keys are in-memory session-only
`docs/architecture.md` – full seams table, adapter diagram, deployment shapes
`docs/data-layer.md` – concrete data model and store wiring
`docs/supabase.md` – Supabase schema, RLS, Edge Functions
Cloud sync NOT enabled. README fixed to honest `coming-soon` status.
Docker does work (was marked "coming soon" — fixed).
New positioning: "Runs anywhere you do — browser, Docker, or Supabase. Same app, you pick the backend."
Privacy reframed as a property (private by default), not the identity.
Marketing page moved OUT of OpenNapse to standalone `/Users/anasabbassi/Documents/abbassi/landing` (not part of monorepo).
OpenNapse reverted to clean state — no three.js deps, no landing page, no gate in main.tsx.
COPY repositioned to hybrid: "runs anywhere — browser / your own server / Supabase".
Real browser-side BYOK test (direct fetch, not local readiness check). CORS failures caught and reported gracefully.
Key storage stays session-only (in-memory). No persistence.
Model dropdown: live GET /v1/models on success, falls back to curated list.
Consolidated AI panel (key, endpoint, test, model, consent in one place).
docs/ serves repo cloners (tutorials + contributor reference), not marketing.
All claims sourced from code. Sync = coming-soon, BYOK keys session-only, SupabaseCloudAdapter written-but-not-wired — documented honestly.
CSP: Report-Only first (needs deployment testing before enforcing). Later escalated to enforced + report-only mirror.
Voice dataUrl: 5MB cap (later 10MB after review). Protects IndexedDB quota.
IndexedDB write error: try/catch with console.warn + rethrow (callers still see failure).
Lightweight date metadata on tasks (scheduledDate, dueDate) instead of separate Calendar entity.
Rationale: Kanban stays the workflow system; corporate work needs "what's due today" more than a full calendar with recurrence/timezones.
Team workspaces disabled in local/self-hosted builds. Team code stays staged behind `ENABLE_TEAM_WORKSPACES = false`.
Rationale: teams only make sense with a hosted control plane (auth, billing, RLS sync, abuse controls).
Future hosted: free to start; paid tiers for teams, commercial use, hosted AI credits, managed sync. Defer exact pricing.
Name: **Focus Sprint** (not Pomodone/PomoDone — third-party brand).
Must link to a concrete entity (task or idea). No unlinked timers.
Local session state only; no persistence yet. Add later if stats/reporting need it.
Only 1 rate-limited path: invite-member Edge Function (20 invites/24h per workspace, HTTP 429).
No application-level rate limiting on: idea creation, note save, task creation, promote flow, AI API calls, import/export, any CRUD operation.
`workspace_invites` has no DELETE policy. Client uses UPDATE-to-revoked pattern — correct for now, but future DELETE calls would fail silently.
Owner can remove self from workspace (no guard against sole owner orphaning the workspace). Mitigated for personal workspaces via bootstrap re-entry.
No Supabase RLS integration tests — policies reviewed statically only.
No double-submit guard on capture/task/note save (M6).
sortOrder not recalculated on Kanban task move.
No task edit UI yet (dates set at creation/import only).
No CSP in Vite dev server (L1).
Invite token exposed to browser JS by design (M3). Mitigations: one-use, 7-day expiry, email-match required on accept.
Fonts Clash Display/Inter referenced in CSS but no woff2 files → system fallback.
All 7 bugs from Jun 30 audit (C1–C4, H1–H2, M1) — verified still fixed in Jul 4 re-audit.
B1–B4 bypass fixes (markdown href sanitization, CSP enforcement, voice async cleanup, hosted AI binding) — all shipped.
Public docs structure — delivered and accurate.
Repo hygiene (gitignore, AGENTS.md, .dockerignore) — done.
JWT rotation advisory — token was expired, opencode.json gitignored, no longer actionable.
Created .supraspace/ memory files.
Marketing landing built then extracted to separate `/Users/anasabbassi/Documents/abbassi/landing` (standalone Vite app, not part of monorepo).
OpenNapse reverted to clean state (no three.js deps, no landing page).
README repositioned to hybrid "runs anywhere" framing (browser / Docker / Supabase).
Product memory established: adapter pattern is the hero, privacy is a property.

**7 bugs fixed**: renderMarkdown XSS (C1), corrupted migration (C2), notes duplication (C3), voice recorder leak (C4), accept-invite email bypass (H1), workspace_members RLS (H2), importData silent overwrite (M1).
**AI settings overhaul**: real BYOK connection test (browser-direct fetch), key visibility toggle, consolidated panel, live model listing.
**Public docs** (8 new files under `docs/`): data-layer, ai, supabase, testing, troubleshooting, views, project-structure, getting-started.
**docs/architecture.md** rewritten from stub to comprehensive reference.
**gitignore/AGENTS.md hygiene**: opencode.json, .opencode/, .supraspace/, lockfiles ignored.
Multi-user/teams security audit: 2 HIGH (voice dataUrl unbounded, CSP missing), 4 MEDIUM, 2 LOW.
**3 more bugs fixed**: voice dataUrl cap (notes.ts 10MB), IndexedDB write try/catch, CSP in Docker nginx.
**41 edge case challenge tests** added (XSS, schema boundaries, Unicode, voice, import, prototype pollution, workspace isolation, AI keys, malformed input).
**Bypass re-audit**: markdown href sanitization, CSP enforced, voice async cleanup hardened, hosted AI workspace binding fix.
Total: 93 tests, all passing.
**Kanban scheduling**: nullable `scheduledDate`/`dueDate` on tasks, date pills on cards, Today/overdue strip. No separate Calendar entity.
**Focus Sprint**: Pomodoro-style timer linked to tasks/ideas. Local session state only. Linked timer (no unlinked productivity theater).
**Teams disabled locally**: `ENABLE_TEAM_WORKSPACES = false`. Team affordances hidden. Future hosted plan recorded in project.md.
**Electron build fix**: preload.cts, tsconfig.
`App.tsx`: default theme now reads `prefers-color-scheme: dark` before falling back to light. Uncommitted.
